TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Amis Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://ami.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Ci Idek wa, o kawas no Pangcah. O mimaanay ko tayal ni Idek i kakarayan, awaay to ko mafana'ay anini. Tilo ni Idek 'Adihay ko sowal no Pancah i ci Idekan. O sa'adihayay i, o "tilo ni Idek" . I roma a niyaro', o "tarakar ni Idek", o "tekar ni Idek", o "sapatiked ni Idek", ato o "pana' ni Idek" saan ko sowal.
S.PHON: ¶i i…¨~…Æ…ôk wa, o~u kawas no~u pa≈ã ¶aƒß. o~u mimaanaj ko~u taja…æ ni i…¨~…Æ…ôk i kakarajan, awaaj to~u ko~u mafana °aj anini. ti…æo~u ni i…¨~…Æ…ôk °a…¨~…Æiƒßaj ko~u so~uwa…æ no~u pan ¶aƒß i ¶i i…¨~…Æ…ôkan. o~u sa °a…¨~…Æiƒßajaj i, o~u "ti…æo~u ni i…¨~…Æ…ôk" . i ro~uma a nijaro~u °, o~u "tarakar ni i…¨~…Æ…ôk", o~u "t…ôkar ni i…¨~…Æ…ôk", o~u "sapatik…ô…¨~…Æ ni i…¨~…Æ…ôk", ato~u o~u "pana ° ni i…¨~…Æ…ôk" saan ko~u so~uwa…æ.
S.FORM: Ci Idek wa, o kawas no Pangcah. O mimaanay ko tayal ni Idek i kakarayan, awaay to ko mafana'ay anini. Tilo ni Idek 'Adihay ko sowal no Pancah i ci Idekan. O sa'adihayay i, o "tilo ni Idek" . I roma a niyaro', o "tarakar ni Idek", o "tekar ni Idek", o "sapatiked ni Idek", ato o "pana' ni Idek" saan ko sowal.
S.PHON: ¶i i…¨~…Æ…ôk wa, o~u kawas no~u pa≈ã ¶aƒß. o~u mimaanaj ko~u taja…æ ni i…¨~…Æ…ôk i kakarajan, awaaj to~u ko~u mafana °aj anini. ti…æo~u ni i…¨~…Æ…ôk °a…¨~…Æiƒßaj ko~u so~uwa…æ no~u pan ¶aƒß i ¶i i…¨~…Æ…ôkan. o~u sa °a…¨~…Æiƒßajaj i, o~u "ti…æo~u ni i…¨~…Æ…ôk" . i ro~uma a nijaro~u °, o~u "tarakar ni i…¨~…Æ…ôk", o~u "t…ôkar ni i…¨~…Æ…ôk", o~u "sapatik…ô…¨~…Æ ni i…¨~…Æ…ôk", ato~u o~u "pana ° ni i…¨~…Æ…ôk" saan ko~u so~uwa…æ.
